title: draba heilii
intro: Draba heilii is a species of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae, commonly known as the Heilii's whitlow grass. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is said to have health benefits such as reducing pain and inflammation, and it may also help to protect against infections. Draba heilii can be prepared into herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
